/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/oj_server.dir/src/oj_server.cpp.o -o /home/yupureki/project/OnlineJudge/output/oj_server  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib -lpthread -lmysqlclient -ljsoncpp -lctemplate -lcpp-httplib -lLogger /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/local/lib/libredis++.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libhiredis.so
